title: ononis biflora var. marocana
intro: Ononis biflora var. marocana, also known as the Maroccan sweet pea, is a variety of the Ononis biflora plant, a species of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ononis biflora var. marocana are said to include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Ononis biflora var. marocana, such as teas and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
